text.content:
Injuries • Force • Boop Nose

Injury Card

Boop Nose

A mischievous force playfully boops your nose at unexpected moments, causing irritation and distraction. The playful spirit makes it hard to focus as your nose tingles annoyingly.

Playful Spirit
Treatment

Gentle nosemassages.

Details

  • Category: Force

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 3 Hit Points

  • Duration: 15

  • Status Effect: Deafened

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • journaltype: injury

  • category: Force

  • odds: 20

  • foldername: Injuries

  • title: Boop Nose

  • imagetitle: Playful Spirit

  • image: icons/magic/earth/strike-fist-stone-gray.webp

  • description: A mischievous force playfully boops your nose at unexpected moments, causing irritation and distraction. The playful spirit makes it hard to focus as your nose tingles annoyingly.

  • treatment: Gentle nosemassages.

  • severity: Minor

  • damage: 3

  • duration: 90

  • action: Apply the Force Injury

  • statuseffect: Deafened

Injuries • Force • Dancing Limbs

Injury Card

Dancing Limbs

Your arms and legs move uncontrollably, as if dancing to an unseen tune. The bizarre movements can be quite entertaining to watch, but exhausting for you as it drains your energy.

Uncontrollable Movements
Treatment

Impromptu dance breaks.

Details

  • Category: Force

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 7 Hit Points

  • Duration: 10

  • Status Effect: Stunned

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

Injuries • Force • Gravity Defiance

Injury Card

Gravity Defiance

Your perception of gravity shifts randomly, causing disorientation and imbalance. Up becomes down and down becomes up, challenging your sense of direction whenever the force decides to play tricks on you.

Up Is Down
Treatment

Inverting your perspective.

Details

  • Category: Force

  • Severity: Major

  • Damage: 11 Hit Points

  • Duration: 5

  • Status Effect: Poisoned

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

Injuries • Force • Tickle Fingers

Injury Card

Tickle Fingers

Whenever you try to grasp something, an invisible force tickles your fingers, causing you to fumble frequently. The mysterious energy surge overwhelms your hands, making precision tasks difficult.

Mysterious Energy Surge
Treatment

Giggling therapy sessions.

Details

  • Category: Force

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 2 Hit Points

  • Duration: 20

  • Status Effect: Prone

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.
